notifications.title: AI-Prowler™ Version 6.0.0
notifications.body: This version has Self Learning capability tools. more meta data on indexed files provide smarter AI usage, Quick Tunnel test Support, and future Auto-Version updates.

notifications.title: AI-Prowler™ Version 6.0.2 Now Avaliable
notifications.body: This version has 11 new tools to allow file and code edits in place in AI-Prowler Directories. Enables Mobile File edits by Claude.

update_notes: Added the complete 11-tool surface for Claude-as-code-editor work
